title: PixelClashSMP
description: Welcome to the PixelClash SMP Modpack! Immerse yourself in the ultimate Cobblemon MMORPG experience designed specifically for the PixelClash server.
body: Welcome to the PixelClash SMP Modpack! Immerse yourself in the ultimate Cobblemon MMORPG experience designed specifically for the PixelClash server. This modpack offers a unique blend of Pokémon adventures and Minecraft gameplay, bringing you an unparalleled multiplayer journey.
